title: Thelypteris kerintjiensis
taxonomy: Thelypteris kerintjiensis is classified under the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a family of ferns. This species is a type of deciduous fern native to the tropical regions of Asia. The family Thelypteridaceae is part of the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The class Polypodiopsida is a group of vascular plants that also includes horsetails and whisk ferns. Thelypteris kerintjiensis is further classified under the genus Thelypteris, which comprises a large number of species of deciduous and evergreen ferns.
